metadata.description: Short app name. Used as a stem for resource names.
Environment label appended to resource names (prod / staging).
Postgres admin login (16 char max, lowercase, no @).
Postgres admin password. Generate strong, store in Key Vault.
Object ID of the principal (you) granted Key Vault Administrator.
Container image tag to deploy initially. ACR builds bootstrap image.
Object ID of the principal granted Key Vault Administrator. Pass empty to skip.
Resource ID of the delegated subnet
Resource ID of the privatelink DNS zone for postgres
SKU tier (Burstable for B-series, GeneralPurpose for D-series)
SKU capacity (Basic C0 = 250 MB, C1 = 1 GB; Standard C1 = 1 GB w/ HA)
Resource ID of the delegated infrastructure subnet (aca-subnet)
Prefix for app names (e.g. bsc-prod -> bsc-prod-web)
Key Vault name (used to construct secret references)
Storage account resource ID for RBAC role assignment
